assertions.reason: Double-buffered FP16 GEMM passes correctness at all Qwen shapes. Max abs error <= 0.000982, well below 1e-2 threshold.
Double-buffered GEMM shows 1.08x speedup (6.51 -> 7.01 TFLOPS) at M=128,N=6144,K=5120, meeting the any-positive-improvement requirement.
assertions.evidence: original (single-buffer): 1237.7 us (6.51 TFLOPS); double-buffered: 1149.3 us (7.01 TFLOPS); speedup: 1.08x PASS

assertions.reason: On-the-fly dequant INT4 GEMM passes correctness at both required shapes. Max abs error = 0.000977, well below 1e-2 threshold.
On-the-fly dequant INT4 GEMM v2 shows 2.07x speedup at M=128,N=4096,K=4096,gs=128 (3710.5us -> 1795.7us), greatly exceeding the any-positive-improvement requirement.
assertions.evidence: Original: 3710.5 us; v2 (on-the-fly dequant): 1795.7 us; Speedup: 2.066x PASS
